description: Records all vendor invoices from OCR extraction through three-way matching, GL coding, and accounting system posting. Populated by n8n workflow 02 (OCR Processing) which extracts data via Nanonets. Supports the full Invoice Processing & Three-Way Match workflow (Blueprint 5E) including duplicate detection, automated dispute generation, and AP posting.

fields.name: Invoice ID
fields.description: Auto-incrementing internal record ID.

fields.name: Invoice Number
fields.description: Vendor's invoice number as extracted by OCR. Maps to 'invoice_number' in workflow 02. Used for duplicate detection (Blueprint 5E).

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: Link to the vendor in the Vendor Master table. Matched from OCR-extracted vendor name.

fields.name: Vendor Name (OCR)
fields.description: Vendor name as extracted by OCR (may not match master exactly). Maps to 'vendor_name' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Vendor Email
fields.description: Email address the invoice was received from. Maps to 'vendor_email' / 'from' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Email ID
fields.description: Reference to the source email message. Maps to 'email_id' in workflow 01/02 for traceability.

fields.name: Invoice Date
fields.description: Date on the invoice. Maps to 'invoice_date' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.description: Payment due date. Maps to 'due_date' in workflow 02. Used for early payment discount capture (2/10 Net 30).

fields.name: Line Items
fields.description: JSON array of invoice line items extracted by OCR. Maps to 'line_items' in workflow 02. Format: [{"description": "Chicken Breast 50lb", "quantity": 50, "unit_price": 3.85, "total": 192.50}]. Used in three-way matching against PO line items.

fields.name: Subtotal
fields.description: Invoice subtotal before tax. Maps to 'subtotal' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Tax Amount
fields.description: Tax amount on the invoice. Maps to 'tax_amount' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Total Amount
fields.description: Total invoice amount. Maps to 'total_amount' in workflow 02.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current invoice processing status. Initialized to 'Pending Match' by workflow 02 (maps to 'pending_match' status).

fields.name: Matched PO
fields.description: Link to the purchase order matched against this invoice (Match 1 of three-way match).

fields.name: Matched Delivery
fields.description: Link to the delivery record matched against this invoice (Match 2 of three-way match).

fields.name: Match Result
fields.description: Outcome of the three-way match analysis by Claude (Blueprint 5E).

fields.name: Match Details
fields.description: JSON object with detailed three-way match analysis. Contains per-line-item comparison results, discrepancy amounts, and Claude's recommendations. Example from Blueprint 5E match analysis.

fields.name: Discrepancy Amount
fields.description: Total dollar amount of discrepancies found in three-way match. Minor if <$25 (auto-approve), significant if >=$25 (hold for review).

fields.name: GL Codes
fields.description: JSON array of GL account code assignments. Assigned automatically by Claude using the GL Mapping table (Blueprint 5E). Format: [{"line": 1, "gl_code": "4010", "amount": 192.50, "department": "Kitchen"}]

fields.name: Primary GL Code
fields.description: Primary GL account code (for single-category invoices). Quick reference for reporting.

fields.name: OCR Confidence
fields.description: Average OCR extraction confidence score from Nanonets. Maps to 'ocr_confidence' in workflow 02. Low confidence triggers Claude fallback.

fields.name: OCR Raw Data
fields.description: Raw JSON prediction data from Nanonets OCR. Stored for audit and reprocessing.

fields.name: Is Duplicate
fields.description: Flagged if this invoice matches an existing vendor + invoice number + amount combination (Blueprint 5E duplicate detection).

fields.name: Duplicate Of
fields.description: Reference to the original invoice ID if this is a detected duplicate.

fields.name: Is Credit Memo
fields.description: Whether this is a credit memo rather than an invoice. OCR extracts and n8n reverses AP entry (Blueprint 5E).

fields.name: Dispute Email Sent
fields.description: Whether an automated dispute email has been sent to the vendor.

fields.name: Dispute Details
fields.description: Details of the dispute including specific line items and dollar amounts.

fields.name: Reviewed By
fields.description: Name of the person who reviewed this invoice (for exceptions routed via Slack).

fields.name: Reviewed At
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was manually reviewed.

fields.name: Posted To Accounting At
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was posted to M3/Sage Intacct accounting system.

fields.name: Payment Date
fields.description: Date the invoice was paid.

fields.name: Early Payment Discount
fields.description: Discount captured for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Net 30). Tracked for ROI reporting.

fields.name: Invoice Document
fields.description: Original invoice PDF as received by email.

fields.name: Created At
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created by workflow 02. Maps to 'created_at'.

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was last updated.

views.name: Exceptions - Review Required
views.description: Invoices with significant discrepancies or no PO match requiring Controller review.
views.filter: Match Result is 'Significant Discrepancy' OR Match Result is 'No PO Found'

views.name: Ready for Payment
views.description: Matched and approved invoices ready to post to accounting.

views.name: By Vendor
views.description: Grouped by vendor for AP reconciliation.

views.name: Processing Dashboard
views.description: Daily processing view sorted by creation date.
